title: scutellaria kiusiana
intro: Scutellaria kiusiana is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to Japan and Korea. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria kiusiana include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Scutellaria kiusiana is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures to promote cardiovascular health and reduce inflammation.
